MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KEVIN L. ELDER of Penney & Associates, Tel No. (916) 786-7662 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Attys. JOHN A. ETCHEVERS and B. THOMAS FRENCH of Hassard, Bonnington, LLP, Tel No. (415) 288-9800 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant failed to maintain its burden of production. Defendant does not show that it is entitled to immunity pursuant to Government Code sec. 855.4 or the other cited sections because defendant does not establish that it carried out with due care its policies regarding the transmission of Legionella baccilus. One of defendant's policies with regard to preventing the transmission of Legionella baccilus is to refrain from using showers or tubs in bone marrow transplant rooms. (Amy Nichols Depo., 43:23-44:2; Locelia Purdy Depo., 48:6-25). The declaration of Bruce Mace fails to address that safety measure or whether defendant complied with it. The court rejects defendant's causation arguments that are raised for the first time in defendant's reply papers. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
